title: Triton Zante 5 Electric Shower - 8.5kW (Zante, Jade, Marbella, Trance 2, Excite)
features: Three spray pattern rub clean shower head
Retrofits Triton Jade III and Zante (3 & 4) models
Start/stop push button for 'set and forget' showering
Low pressure indicator and power on lights
2 year parts and labour guarantee (2 Years)
description: Zante 5 allows you to set your ideal shower settings with separate temperature and power control dials, as well as featuring a standalone start/stop switch to turn the shower on or off to your previous temperature and power settings. Furthermore, an easy to clean, three spray pattern rub-clean shower head is sure to provide you with your perfect showering experience. Plumbing System: Cold Mains Minimum Running Pressure/Flow Required: 1 Bar @ 8 l/min Maximum Static Pressure: 10 Bar
